entity.summary: Singapore-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in July 2018, offering spot, derivatives, staking, and lending services with a long-standing focus on XRP markets.
entity.notes: Official company histories place Bitrue's launch in mid-July 2018. The exchange suffered a roughly USD 23 million hot-wallet exploit on April 14, 2023, temporarily suspended withdrawals, compensated affected users, and continued operating.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Bitrue brand.

changes.summary: Singapore-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in July 2018, offering spot, derivatives, staking, and lending services with a long-standing focus on XRP markets.
changes.notes: Official company histories place Bitrue's launch in mid-July 2018. The exchange suffered a roughly USD 23 million hot-wallet exploit on April 14, 2023, temporarily suspended withdrawals, compensated affected users, and continued operating.

events.title: Bitrue launched in July 2018
events.description: Bitrue launched as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange in mid-July 2018 with an early focus on XRP-denominated markets.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish mid-July 2018 but not an exact public launch day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level marker.

events.title: Bitrue lost about USD 23 million in a hot-wallet exploit
events.description: Bitrue identified an exploit of one hot wallet on April 14, 2023 that removed approximately USD 23 million in several crypto-assets and prompted a temporary withdrawal suspension and security review.
events.notes: Bitrue said the affected wallet held less than five percent of overall funds and committed to compensate affected users; the incident did not establish a terminal shutdown.

evidence.title: Looking Back On 2 Years Of Success
evidence.notes: Official retrospective states that Bitrue originally launched in mid-July 2018.

evidence.title: Bitrue: Leading the Way for XRP Adoption and Support
evidence.notes: Official company article corroborates that Bitrue was founded in 2018 and initially listed XRP among its core assets.

evidence.title: Update on Bitrue's Security Breach
evidence.notes: Official incident statement records the April 14 exploit, approximately USD 23 million loss, temporary withdrawal suspension, and planned compensation.

evidence.title: Bitrue crypto exchange hacked for about $23 million
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous independent reporting corroborates the hot-wallet exploit, loss estimate, and withdrawal suspension.

evidence.title: About Bitrue
evidence.notes: The official company page verifies the current Bitrue identity and continuing exchange operation.
